meta.title: Javier Martos | Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Javier Martos Carrascosa — web developer in training with team management experience.

hero.name: Javier Martos Carrascosa
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer | Manager with 15+ years of experience

about: Team management and problem-solving specialist (Mercadona) transitioning into web development. Strong foundation in Java and PHP. First full-stack app shipped: Habit Dock, a production PWA built with Next.js and PostgreSQL.

items: Team Leadership: Direct management of 20+ people, coordinating shifts, training, and professional development to maximize performance.
Process Optimization: Operational improvements in supply chain and stock management, reducing waste and improving efficiency.
Analysis & Strategy: Data-driven decisions based on sales KPIs and commercial targets to ensure store profitability.
Problem Solving: Handling incidents in high-pressure environments while maintaining service excellence and customer satisfaction.

complementary.title: Introduction to Web Development: HTML and CSS

habit-dock.title: Habit Dock
habit-dock.description: First full-stack app in production: Seinfeld-style habit calendar, tasks, and stats. Installable PWA on iPhone. Multi-user auth, deployed on Vercel with PostgreSQL (Neon).

pomodoro-java.title: Pomodoro Timer Java
pomodoro-java.description: Migration from Python to Java 17. Statistics tracking and native audio.

inventario.title: Inventory Management
inventario.description: Full-stack PHP/MySQL system for stock optimization.
